name: widget_state_entity_register
briefDescription: Register a state extracted from a widget spec s FSM .

name: widget_state_entity_reachable_from
briefDescription:
Compute all states reachable from this state via 
 transitions .

name: widget_state_entity_unreachable_states
briefDescription:
Find states in this widget s FSM that no transition 
 leads to ( dead states ) .

name: widget_state_entity_trace_event
briefDescription:
Trace how an event is handled across all states in 
 the widget .
